name: Xenia Hotels & Resorts, Inc.
description: Xenia Hotels & Resorts, Inc. is a self-advised and self-administered real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in a diversified portfolio of luxury and upper-upscale hotels and resorts. Headquartered in Orlando, Florida, the company focuses on properties located in top 25 lodging markets and key leisure destinations across the United States. By partnering with industry-leading hotel brands and maintaining a disciplined approach to asset management, Xenia aims to enhance long-term shareholder value through strategic growth, operational excellence, and the maintenance of a flexible, conservative balance sheet.
